content:
🚀 hoodik | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing a secure, self-hosted, and end-to-end encrypted cloud storage solution for individuals and organizations prioritizing data privacy.
✨ Key Features: • End-to-end encryption (RSA + AEGIS-128L) • Secure search with tokenized and hashed metadata • Encrypted markdown notes with WYSIWYG editor • Public sharing links with secure key management • Two-factor authentication (TOTP)
📖 Summary: Hoodik is a self-hosted, end-to-end encrypted cloud storage server built with Rust and Vue.js. It prioritizes user privacy by performing all encryption and decryption in the browser, ensuring the server never accesses plaintext data. The system supports secure file storage, encrypted notes, searchable metadata, and various backend storage options.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 headless-terminal | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating and scripting interactive terminal applications (TUIs) for tasks like agent-driven coding, CI testing, demo generation, and debugging.
✨ Key Features: • Run and control interactive TUIs in background sessions • Send keystrokes and capture screen output • Snapshot terminal screen as text or PNG • Watch live sessions for debugging or pair programming • Scriptable CLI for automation and CI/CD integration
📖 Summary: Headless Terminal (ht) allows you to programmatically control terminal-based applications (TUIs) like vim, emacs, or htop. It provides a Go CLI and a daemon that manages pseudo-terminals, enabling scripting, testing, and automation of interactive command-line interfaces.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 pentagi | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automated penetration testing and security vulnerability assessment using AI agents.
✨ Key Features: • Fully Autonomous AI-powered penetration testing • Secure & Isolated Docker environment • 20+ professional security tools (nmap, metasploit, sqlmap, etc.) • Smart Memory System for storing research results • Knowledge Graph Integration (Graphiti/Neo4j)
📖 Summary: PentAGI is an open-source, autonomous AI agent system designed for automated penetration testing. It leverages a multi-agent architecture and integrates professional security tools within a sandboxed environment to discover and exploit vulnerabilities.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 claude-code-telegram | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling developers to interact with and manage their codebase using AI assistance remotely through a Telegram interface.
✨ Key Features: • Remote access to Claude Code via Telegram • Natural language interaction for code analysis, editing, and explanation • Automatic session persistence per project • Code on the go from any device • Proactive notifications from webhooks, scheduled jobs, and CI/CD events
📖 Summary: This Python-based Telegram bot provides remote access to Claude Code, allowing users to interact with their codebase conversationally from anywhere. It supports session persistence, proactive notifications, and secure access, making AI-assisted code analysis and modification convenient on the go.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
